settings.title: — FIELD NOTES  ·  WRITTEN BY BILLY  ·  NO GHOSTWRITERS

settings.editor: Six decades on the iron. Eight decades hungry. Read what they don't teach you in textbooks — and what nobody bothers to put on Instagram. Lions help lions.

settings.title:
How a 67-year-old Mr. Universe
still out-lifts you.

settings.editor: It isn't genetics. It isn't drugs. It isn't morning routines borrowed from billionaires. It's eighty years of refusing to phone in the warm-up — and a brutally honest measurement system most lifters can't stomach. Here's the framework I've used on world champions, executives, and one very stubborn 67-year-old in the mirror.
The plant-based dogma is a marketing budget. Here's what apex performers actually fuel with — and the macro math behind it.
Waking early isn't discipline. It's a sleep schedule. Here's the difference, and what discipline actually looks like at the rep level.
Adaptation happens between sessions, not during them. The recovery framework I prescribe to clients in their forties, fifties, and sixties.
Why the waitlist exists, what disqualifies a candidate, and how I decide who's ready for the work and who isn't.
Lions don't lose sleep over the opinions of sheep. The mental architecture I've borrowed, stolen, and built across forty years of coaching champions.
Stuck on a plateau? The exact protocol I run in week one when a new client walks in stronger on paper than they are in the gym.

settings.title: 08 / KEEP UP  ·  ONE EMAIL, ONE LESSON, ONE LIFT

settings.editor: No spam. No re-warmed Instagram captions. No 12-tab pop-ups telling you to download a meal plan. Just one note, every Monday, from the floor of the gym.
Two-time winner of the World's Best Personal Trainer Contest. Fitness Hall of Fame. Trainer to Tony Robbins and elite NFL athletes.
Serious about transforming your body and mind? Start the conversation.
